scope.branch: feature/T-019-m3-2-project-registration-slice-2 (fast-forwarded into main; deleted per the branching strategy rule 7)
in_scope: RegisterProjectForm at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/RegisterProjectForm.razor + scoped CSS (the registration modal; HTML5 native <dialog open> element; data-testid attributes for testability; name + path fields; CanSubmit gate; injects IProjectService; calls RegisterAsync; OnRegistered event callback).

RenameProjectForm at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/RenameProjectForm.razor + scoped CSS (the rename modal; pre-fills the new name with the project's current name in OnParametersSet; CanSubmit gate: non-empty new name + new name differs from current; injects IProjectService; calls RenameAsync; OnRenamed event callback).

ConfirmUnregisterProject at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/ConfirmUnregisterProject.razor + scoped CSS (the unregister confirmation modal; two-button confirmation; injects IProjectService; calls UnregisterAsync; OnUnregistered event callback).

AppProjectCard modified at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/AppProjectCard.razor: Rename + Unregister buttons enabled; new OnRename + OnUnregister EventCallback parameters; data-testid attributes; Open button remains disabled (M4-A's responsibility).

AppProjectList modified at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/AppProjectList.razor: composes the three new modals; new state for which modal is visible + the target project; exposes ShowRegisterDialog() method (the page header delegates to it) and RefreshAsync() method (the form components invoke it on success).

Projects.razor modified at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Pages/Projects.razor: page header's Register a project button enabled; data-testid on the button; click handler delegates to AppProjectList.ShowRegisterDialog().

Component tests: RegisterProjectFormTests (8), RenameProjectFormTests (8), ConfirmUnregisterProjectTests (5), AppProjectCardTests extended (+5), ProjectsPageTests extended (+2), AppProjectListTests extended (+5).
Architecture tests: PagesResolveProjectsThroughServiceTests extended (+3 — one per new form component).

M4-A. M4-A is the durable IProjectStore + the Open action; the M3 / M4-A boundary is the contract, not the storage medium.
Provider implementation. The brief says: 'Do not create providers.' M3.2 ships no provider; the first provider lands in M4-D.
Process execution. M3.2 is a pure in-process state-management milestone; IProcessRunner and the process boundary land in M4-A.
Durable storage. The M3 in-memory store is the smoke test for the IProjectStore contract; the on-disk IProjectStore lands in M4-A behind the same contract.
AppDialog primitive. The plan listed AppDialog.razor as a possible addition; the minimum-blast-radius decision is to use HTML5 native <dialog> directly (see Deviations).
Axe-core audit activation. The 3 axe-core tests remain registered-but-disabled per ADR-016 / M4-D.
Provider-boundary tests activation. The 4 provider-boundary tests remain registered-but-disabled per ADR-016 / M4-D.
Pushing to the remote. Push is not authorised in this session; the remote (origin = https://github.com/maestroohk/ai-engineering-platform.git) is configured but pushing is not authorised.

last_action.outcome: M3.2 is delivered 2026-07-11. The M3 surface's three mutations land: the registration form (RegisterProjectForm), the rename form (RenameProjectForm), the unregister confirmation (ConfirmUnregisterProject). All three use HTML5 native <dialog open> elements with scoped CSS and data-testid attributes. The AppProjectCard's Rename + Unregister buttons are enabled (Open remains disabled for M4-A). The page header's Register a project button is enabled. The AppProjectList exposes ShowRegisterDialog() and RefreshAsync() methods. The architecture test Pages_Resolve_Projects_Through_Service is extended with three new tests covering the three new form components; the single-seam rule holds. 30 new bUnit tests + 3 new architecture tests + 0 new unit tests (the M3.1 IProjectServiceTests already covered the happy-path + failure paths). The M3.2 implementation report is at implementation-report-m3-2-project-registration-slice-2.md. The M3.2 per-session handoff is at .ai/handoffs/2026-07-11-m3-2-project-registration-slice-2.md (mirrored to latest.md). The M3 closeout (M3.x) is promoted to Ready in tasks.json. The M3.2 closeout commit is on main; the M3.2 feature branch is fast-forwarded into main per the branching strategy rule 6; the branch is deleted per rule 7. Validation results: 273 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped (per ADR-016); 0 warnings, 0 errors; format clean; visual smoke green. No push (not authorised).

intended_next_action: Stop. The next session is the M3 closeout (M3.x) implementation. The M3 closeout plan is to be drafted from the Milestone Closeout Standard at .ai/workflows/milestone-closeout.md. Do NOT begin M3 closeout in this session.
session_notes: M3.2 implementation session (2026-07-11). The user's brief was the Next invocation — the end-to-end collapsed form of Continue + Approve + the 13-step Progressive Coding lifecycle. The first dependency-satisfied Ready task was T-019 (M3.2). The session executes the brief in the order: (a) reconcile state with the repository; (b) approve the M3.2 plan implicitly (per the brief, the plan approval is implicit; the session executes the implementation); (c) implement M3.2: RegisterProjectForm + RenameProjectForm + ConfirmUnregisterProject; AppProjectCard button enablement; AppProjectList modal state + ShowRegisterDialog + RefreshAsync; Projects.razor button enablement; the three component test files; the architecture test extension; docs/projects.md update; (d) validate the M3.2 slice end-to-end (6 gates: css:build, restore, build, test, format, visual smoke — all green; 273 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped); (e) update the project-continuity state per Rule 15 (session.json, tasks.json, current.md, task-board.md, milestones.json, ROADMAP.md, master-delivery-plan.md, handoffs/latest.md); (f) write the M3.2 implementation report at implementation-report-m3-2-project-registration-slice-2.md; (g) write the M3.2 per-session handoff at .ai/handoffs/2026-07-11-m3-2-project-registration-slice-2.md (mirrored to latest.md); (h) promote M3 closeout (M3.x) to Ready; (i) create the single coherent commit on the feature branch (feat(m3.2): enable project registration form, rename, and unregister); (j) fast-forward the feature branch into main per the branching strategy rule 6; (k) delete the feature branch per rule 7; (l) stop. Push is skipped (no push in this session; the user controls pushes per the command protocol). Three documented deviations: (1) AppDialog is not introduced; HTML5 native <dialog> is used instead (minimum-blast-radius); (2) M3.2 unit tests are reused from M3.1 (the M3.1 IProjectServiceTests already cover the happy-path + failure paths); (3) Disabled tests unchanged.
